info.title: iHealth OpenAPI V2
info.description: The iHealth OpenAPI V2 allows developers to interact with iHealth health device data including blood pressure, weight, blood glucose, blood oxygen, activity reports, sleep reports, and sport reports. Supports per-user and per-application data access with pagination.

get.summary: Get Blood Pressure data for a specific user
get.description: Retrieves paginated Blood Pressure data for the specified user. The userId is retrieved by AccessToken.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: UserID retrieved by AccessToken

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: The ID for the client request

parameters.name: client_secret
parameters.description: The key for the request

parameters.name: access_token
parameters.description: The token for access

parameters.name: sc
parameters.description: The serial number for the user

parameters.name: sv
parameters.description: Type-specific one-on-one value based on sv

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Unix timestamp for data start time

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Unix timestamp for data end time (must be later than start_time)

parameters.name: page_index
parameters.description: The page index of data, starting from 1

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Set the locale / units returned

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or expired access token

get.summary: Get all Blood Pressure data for the application
get.description: Retrieves paginated Blood Pressure data across all users in the application.

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: The ID for the client request

parameters.name: client_secret
parameters.description: The key for the request

parameters.name: access_token
parameters.description: The token for access

parameters.name: sc
parameters.description: The serial number for the user

parameters.name: sv
parameters.description: Type-specific one-on-one value based on sv

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Unix timestamp for data start time

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Unix timestamp for data end time (must be later than start_time)

parameters.name: page_index
parameters.description: The page index of data, starting from 1

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Set the locale / units returned

200.description: Successful Blood Pressure data response (all users)

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or expired access token
